meaning: adj.没有执照的,未经当局许可的,无节制的
examples: Unlicensed steroids are being disguised as herbal medicines.
While searching the house they discovered an unlicensed shotgun and a licensed rifle.
In Amsterdam, officials are using Airbnb listings to track down unlicensed hotels.
They voted down extending background checks to people who buy from unlicensed dealers, at gun shows and online.
He admitted the alternative charge of causing death by driving unlicensed, disqualified or uninsured.
